commandHandlers.signature: src/commands/{command}.cjs -- one file per command group
commandHandlers.description: Split command handlers extracted from rapid-tools.cjs, each exporting handler functions

parseArgs.description: Lightweight argument parser supporting --flag value and --flag=value patterns

readAndValidateStdin.description: Reads stdin JSON and validates against a Zod schema, throwing typed error on validation failure

exitWithError.description: Standardized error output: JSON to stdout, human-readable to stderr, then process.exit

stateSchemas.description: Updated state schemas needed for stdin validation and state operations in split handlers

resumeSet.signature: resumeSet(cwd: string, setId: string, options?: object): Promise<object>
resumeSet.description: Resume function that the execute command handler delegates to

withMergeStateTransaction.signature: withMergeStateTransaction(cwd: string, setId: string, mutationFn: (state) => void): Promise<void>
withMergeStateTransaction.description: Merge state transaction wrapper used by merge command handler

jsonOutputPreserved.description: All JSON output format must remain identical to pre-split format -- skills and agents parse specific fields

routerUnder300Lines.description: rapid-tools.cjs must be reduced to a thin router under 300 lines

consistentErrorFormat.description: All handlers must use exitWithError() for error responses -- no mixed error patterns
